Ocean’s Thirteen (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $117,144,465Details
International Box Office $194,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $311,744,465
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $49,088,942
Total $49,088,942
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$36,133,403 (30.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$85,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,565 opening theaters/3,565 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $203,640,672

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 8th, 2007 (Wide) by Warner Bros., released as Ocean's Thirteen
International Releases: August 30th, 2024 (Limited), released as Ocean's Thirteen (4K Restoration) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: November 13th, 2007 by Warner Home Video, released as Ocean's Thirteen
MPA Rating: PG-13 for brief sensuality
Running Time: 122 minutes
Franchise: Ocean's Eleven
Plot point: Gambling, Heist, Revenge
Social setting: Crime Caper
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
